projectDescription: A real-time AI system that analyzes video footage to detect violent activities using a Temporal Segment Network (TSN) model with YOLOv8-based human masking and Grad-CAM visualizations.
keyFeatures: Temporal Segment Network (TSN) with ResNet-18 backbone for video violence classification
YOLOv8-based human masking to focus inference on detected persons
Grad-CAM heatmap visualization highlighting the most active regions in a frame
Flask REST API accepting video uploads and returning predictions with confidence scores
Browser-based web client supporting file upload and live camera recording
Support for multiple video formats: MP4, AVI, MOV, MKV, WebM, M4V
publicApiSurface: POST /predict — upload a video and receive violence prediction, confidence, person count, most active frame, and Grad-CAM visualization
apply_human_mask(frame) — YOLOv8 person detection and frame masking
generate_gradcam(model, masked_frame, device, target_class) — Grad-CAM heatmap generation
